title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: Caleb Writes Code argues that while the US leads in AI chips, models, and applications, China holds a structural advantage in power generation and transmission for data centers at scale. The video attributes this to political fragmentation in the US versus centralized planning in China, and examines workarounds by Google, Meta, OpenAI, and AWS.
